text: How vacuum drain is done in Framo pumps?

options.text: Pump has a different vacuum line which is connected to the cargo tank well; vacuum pump is used to suck the oil out to make the well dry
Vacuum is created in the stripping line to pump the cargo out to make the well dry
Vacuum drain is used to check leakage in pump's cofferdam
vacuum drain is part of the pump casing **Correct answer : Pump has a different vacuum line which is connected to the cargo tank well; vacuum pump is used to suck the oil out to make the well dry**

explanation: Framo cargo pumps utilize a specialized vacuum drain line connected to the tank well. By applying a vacuum, the system can clear the remaining cargo from the well even when the main pump has lost suction due to low levels.
